result:
I'd make curiosity the default human state.

Not the polite, hobby-level kind, but a relentless, almost uncomfortable drive to understand how things actually work — physics, biology, other people, themselves — without the usual filters of ego, tribe, or comforting story. Most of the world's biggest problems seem to stem from people either not knowing enough or actively preferring not to. Flip that, and a lot of the rest starts solving itself.

message.content:

message.reasoning_content:
I think the best single change to the world would be to make truth-seeking and curiosity the core drives for all humans, replacing fear, greed, or tribalism with a universal pursuit of understanding the universe.

This aligns perfectly with xAI's mission to advance scientific discovery and understand the true nature of the universe.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
